scope: Service booking, product purchase, install booking, contact/local action, and Tire Hotel retention journey QA.

observations: Service page renders a specific H1, service summary, price/process sections, related services, and a specific Book car service CTA.
Booking CTA opens a modal with dialog role, heading, progress, labelled license plate input, date picker, cancel, close, and disabled Continue until required inputs exist.
Booking submission was not completed to avoid creating test customer data.
risks: Current source still names the submit-success analytics event booking_completed; D-2 requires rename/alias to booking_submitted.

observations: Product page renders exact variant name, size, price, VAT, quantity, stock, delivery, EAN/specs, fitment caveat, and Add to cart.
Cart dialog renders item identity, quantity controls, subtotal, VAT note, remove, continue shopping, checkout, and clear cart.
Checkout renders labelled contact fields, delivery choice, billing checkbox, terms/privacy link, order summary, VAT, total, and secure payment copy.
Confirm order is disabled until terms are accepted; missing required customer data triggers validation before payment creation.
risks: Checkout exposes duplicate responsive submit buttons to strict browser-agent locators.
Checkbox controls appeared duplicated in the accessibility tree.
Validation error appeared as a toast instead of field-associated error text in the visible accessibility snapshot.

routes_smoked: source-only: order email install URL and order_install_booking
observations: Paid order confirmation can return an install URL.
createInstallBookingFromOrder rejects reused install tokens and creates one confirmed booking tied to the order.
Booking email/manage thread is seeded after install booking creation.
risks: No real paid-order install token was available for browser smoke.
Install booking success must not be treated as completed service.

observations: Contact page renders H1, address, tel link, mailto link, hours, map iframe, FAQ, and booking CTA on mobile.
Contact actions remain available without analytics consent.
risks: Footer social links point to generic platform homepages, not verified Mitra Auto profiles.
GBP/citation owner readback remains unavailable from D-3.

observations: Tire Hotel page renders storage promise, price, process, inclusions, exclusions, suitability, safety limits, related services, and specific booking CTA.
Owner-review caveat is visible in content.
risks: Retention lifecycle definitions and source data remain owner/platform exceptions.
No live retention/account data was available.

findings.title: Checkout responsive controls create duplicate agent targets
findings.evidence: Strict locator for Vahvista tilaus resolved to two submit buttons, one mobile and one desktop, in the DOM.
findings.impact: Browser agents and assistive tech can encounter ambiguous high-impact actions if hidden controls are not fully removed from the accessibility tree.

findings.title: Checkout validation is toast-level rather than field-associated
findings.evidence: Submitting checkout with accepted terms and empty required fields produced toast text Täytä etu- ja sukunimi.
findings.impact: Screen reader and keyboard users may have weaker recovery than with inline field errors tied to invalid controls.

findings.title: Footer social links are placeholders
findings.evidence: Footer links resolve to https://facebook.com, https://twitter.com, https://instagram.com, and https://linkedin.com.
findings.impact: Trust and local proof are weakened; users can leave the site without reaching a real Mitra profile.

gate_result.next_required_task: D-5 - Experiment And Monitoring QA Closeout
